getAudioFileList.description: Returns a list of all available audio files in the expansion.

getDataFileList.description: Returns a list of all available data files in the expansion.

getExpansionType.description: returns the expansion type. Use the constants of ExpansionHandler to resolve the integer number.

getImageList.description: Returns a list of all available images in the expansion.

getMidiFileList.description: Returns a list of all available MIDI files in the expansion.

getProperties.description: Returns an object containing all properties of the expansion.

getRootFolder.description: Returns the root folder for this expansion.

getSampleFolder.description: Returns the folder where this expansion looks for samples.

getSampleMapList.description: Returns a list of all available sample maps in the expansion.

getUserPresetList.description: Returns a list of all available user presets in the expansion.

getWildcardReference.description: Returns a valid wildcard reference ((`{EXP::Name}relativePath`) for the expansion.

loadDataFile.description: Attempts to parse a JSON file in the AdditionalSourceCode directory of the expansion.

rebuildUserPresets.description: Reextracts (and overrides) the user presets from the given expansion. Only works with intermediate / encrypted expansions.

setAllowDuplicateSamples.description: Sets whether the samples are allowed to be duplicated for this expansion. Set this to false if you operate on the same samples differently.

setSampleFolder.description: Changes the sample folder of that particular expansion.

unloadExpansion.description: Unloads this expansion so it will not show up in the list of expansions until the next restart.

writeDataFile.description: Writes the given data into the file in the AdditionalSourceCode directory of the expansion.
